title: Design System: Kynd — The Instrument Panel

display.purpose: Hero headlines and marketing landing titles only. Never used inside the app.

headline.purpose: Section headers, page titles, modal headers.

title.purpose: Card titles, persona names, feature headings.

label.purpose: Data labels, metric names, badge text. Always Geist Mono, uppercase.

mono.purpose: Code snippets, numeric data, chat messages.

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Focus indicator on interactive elements only.

motion.name: ease-snappy
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions. Snappy, no bounce, no drift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Signal Indigo fill, used for the single most important action on screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); color: oklch(0.98 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.5 0.18 270); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 270 / 0.3); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button. Outlined with Panel Edge border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.95 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.2 0.01 265); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.16 0.01 265); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 270 / 0.15); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Ghost button for low-importance actions within cards and panels.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.52 0.01 265); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(0.95 0 0); background: oklch(0.14 0.01 265); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 270 / 0.2); }

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Standard data container. Flat surface with tonal separation and a thin border.
components.html:
Persona Analysis

Complete

Behavioral profile for target persona segment across 12 dimensions.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.14 0.01 265); border: 1px solid oklch(0.2 0.01 265); border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(0.95 0 0); margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.52 0.01 265); margin: 0; } .ds-badge { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); background: oklch(0.18 0.01 265); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text input field. Transparent with thin border. Focus state uses Signal Indigo border and subtle glow.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Enter target audience description..." />
components.css: .ds-input { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.95 0 0); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.2 0.01 265); border-radius: 6px; outline: none; width: 320px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.40 0.01 265); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 270 / 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Navigation item in the sidebar. Ghost-style with active state.
components.html: DashboardPersonas
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: oklch(0.1 0.01 265); width: 240px; padding: 12px 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: oklch(0.52 0.01 265); font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.14 0.01 265); color: oklch(0.95 0 0); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.14 0.01 265); color: oklch(0.95 0 0); } .ds-nav-item svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Chip / Badge
components.description: Status badge and metadata chip. Geist Mono, uppercase, compact.
components.html: SkepticalAnalyticalCritical
components.css: .ds-chip { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.52 0.01 265); background: oklch(0.18 0.01 265); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; } .ds-chip-active { color: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); } .ds-chip-danger { color: oklch(0.58 0.2 28); }

components.name: Psychometric Progress Bar
components.description: Friction Bar for psychometric scoring. Thin track with Signal Indigo fill and semantic labels.
components.css: .ds-progress-group { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; } .ds-progress-label { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.52 0.01 265); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-progress-track { flex: 1; height: 6px; background: oklch(0.18 0.01 265); border-radius: 999px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-progress-fill { height: 100%; background: oklch(0.55 0.18 270); border-radius: 999px; transition: width 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }

narrative.overview: Kynd is a precise research instrument, not a dashboard. Like the cockpit of a high-end microscope or the control surface of a recording console, every element exists because it serves a function. The interface is a clear lens between the user and the behavioral data — when it works well, the user forgets it's there. Personality: Sharp, confident, minimal. The visual system takes cues from Notion's editorial clarity, Arc's spatial conviction, and Raycast's keyboard-first precision. Warmth comes from craft, not from ornamentation. This system explicitly rejects the Generic AI SaaS aesthetic — no gradient heroes, no glass-morphism cards, no hero-metric template, no decorative blur as default surface treatment. Color is rare and purposeful. Surfaces are flat. Motion is mechanical, not playful.
keyCharacteristics: Dark mode primary, light mode secondary — the instrument lives in dim rooms at late hours
One accent color (indigo-violet) used on ≤10% of any screen; its rarity is the point
Flat surfaces with crisp, thin borders — no shadows at rest
Snappy, mechanical motion — 150ms transitions, expo easing, zero bounce
Typographic hierarchy driven by weight and scale contrast, not color

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The accent (Signal Indigo) occupies no more than 10% of any given screen. Its scarcity is what gives it power. If a screen feels colorful, the rule is broken.

rules.name: The No-Black Rule
rules.body: Never use #000 or rgb(0,0,0). Every dark surface has chromatic temperature. Charcoal carries a faint blue tilt because indigo is the brand hue, not because 'dark mode = desaturated black.'

rules.name: The Flat-Edge Rule
rules.body: Borders are thin (1px) and present. They separate surfaces so shadows don't have to. If a border is doing its job, a shadow isn't needed.

rules.name: The Mono-Data Rule
rules.body: All quantitative data — scores, metrics, timestamps, tokens — renders in Geist Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Numbers must align in tables and lists.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: No mixing display fonts with body fonts. Geist Sans carries everything. Hierarchy comes from weight, size, and the Sans-vs-Mono switch, not from font changes.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow at rest. Shadows are prohibited as a layout tool. The only exception is interactive hover states on primary actions.

dos: Do let surfaces separate by lightness alone — one OKLCH step between background, card, and raised surface is enough.
Do use Signal Indigo sparingly: one element per viewport at most.
Do render all numeric data in Geist Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums.
Do use borders (thin, 1px, Panel Edge) to define surface boundaries.
Do keep transitions at 150ms with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).
Do use backdrop dim (rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) as the only elevation cue for modals.
donts: Don't use box-shadows to convey depth.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient) anywhere.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left >1px as an accent on cards or list items).
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop blur + semi-transparency) as a default surface treatment.
Don't use pill-shaped buttons. Radius stays at 6px for interactive elements.
Don't use bounce easing or elastic transitions.
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, gradient, supporting stats).
Don't use identical card grids where every card has the same icon + heading + text structure.
Don't reach for a modal as the first interaction pattern.
Don't use color as the sole differentiator for any state or action.
Don't reference the old design system. This document supersedes all prior visual guidance.
